content: Relative Extreme Values 设 f(x,y)f(x,y)f(x,y) 是双变量函数，点 (x0,y0)(x_0,y_0)(x0​,y0​) 被称为极值点，当且仅当 f(x0,y0)≥(≤)f(x,y)f(x_0,y_0)\ge (\le) f(x,y)f(x0​,y0​)≥(≤)f(x,y) for all (x,y)(x,y)(x,y) in some neighborhood of (x0,y0)(x_0,y_0)(x0​,y0​)． 当 (x0,y0)(x_0,y_0)(x0​,y0​) 为 f(x,y)f(x,y)f(x,y) 的极值点时，有 fx(x0,y0)=fy(x0,y0)=0f_x(x_0,y_0)=f_y(x_0,y_0)=0fx​(x0​,y0​)=fy​(x0​,y0​)=0．满足偏导数为 000 的点称为 critical point． Saddle Point, Extreme Point 令 P(x0,y0)P(x_0,y_0)P(x0​,y0​) 为 f(x,y)f(x,y)f(x,y) 的关键点，且 A=fxx(x0,y0),B=fxy(x0,y0),C=fyy(x0,y0)A=f_{xx}(x_0,y_0), B=f_{xy}(x_0,y_0),C=f_{yy}(x_0,y_0)A=fxx​(x0​,y0​),B=fxy​(x0​,y0​),C=fyy​(x0​,y0​)，对于 H=AC−B2H=AC-B^2H=AC−B2 如果 H0 and A0H\gt 0\texttt{ and }A\lt 0H0 and A0，那么 PPP 为极大值点 (Relative Maximum) 如果 H0 and A0H\gt 0\texttt{ and }A\gt 0H0 and A0，那么 PPP 为极小值点 (Relative Minimum) 如果 H0H\lt 0H0，那么 PPP 是鞍点 (Saddle Point) 否则 H=0H=0H=0，无法判断． 拉格朗日乘数法找极值点 沃趣，这不是最优化理论里面讲到的符号优化方法吗（ Consider constraints g(x,y,z)=0g(x,y,z)=0g(x,y,z)=0, we just need to minimize the following objective function, so that the constraints are satisfied. f(x,y,z)−λg(x,y,z)f(x,y,z)-\lambda g(x,y,z) f(x,y,z)−λg(x,y,z) Consider finding the partial derivatives for x,y,z,λx,y,z,\lambdax,y,z,λ so as to find the critical points. fx=λgxfy=λgyfz=λgzg=0\begin{aligned} f_x =\lambda g_x \\ f_y =\lambda g_y \\ f_z =\lambda g_z \\ g = 0 \end{aligned} fx​fy​fz​g​=λgx​=λgy​=λgz​=0​ Newton-Raphson Method to Solve Equations 沃趣，迭代法！ 经典的牛顿迭代法是这样做单变量的迭代： xn+1=xn−f(xn)f′(xn)x_{n+1}=x_n-\frac{f(x_n)}{f(x_n)} xn+1​=xn​−f′(xn​)f(xn​)​ This method can be extended to multi-variable cases. Consider the following eqns {f(x,y)=0g(x,y)=0\begin{cases} f(x,y)=0 \\ g(x,y)=0 \end{cases} {f(x,y)=0g(x,y)=0​ 假设其真实解为 (a,b)(a,b)(a,b) 我们初始的估计为 (x0,y0)(x_0,y_0)(x0​,y0​)，那么我们可以不妨设 x0+h=ay0+k=b\begin{aligned} x_0+h=a\\ y_0+k=b \end{aligned} x0​+hy0​+k​=a=b​ 那么，让两个方程的左式都在 (x0,y0)(x_0,y_0)(x0​,y0​) 处进行泰勒展开： {0=f(x0,y0)+hfx(x0,y0)+kfy(x0,y0)0=g(x0,y0)+hgx(x0,y0)+kgy(x0,y0)\begin{cases} 0=f(x_0,y_0)+h f_x(x_0,y_0)+k f_y(x_0,y_0)\\ 0=g(x_0,y_0)+h g_x(x_0,y_0)+k g_y(x_0,y_0)\\ \end{cases} {0=f(x0​,y0​)+hfx​(x0​,y0​)+kfy​(x0​,y0​)0=g(x0​,y0​)+hgx​(x0​,y0​)+kgy​(x0​,y0​)​ 于是，我们可以解出 h0,k0h_0,k_0h0​,k0​ 的具体数值，再代入 x1=x0+h0,y1=y0+k0x_1=x_0+h_0,y_1=y_0+k_0x1​=x0​+h0​,y1​=y0​+k0​ 进行多轮迭代．

title: (Discrete) Binomial Distribution
content: The number of successes in nnn independent trials of a Bernoulli(p)\text{Bernoulli}(p)Bernoulli(p) r.v., denoted as X∼Binomial(n,p)X\sim \text{Binomial}(n, p)X∼Binomial(n,p) Its PDF is p(x∣n,p)=(nx)px(1−p)p(x|n,p)=\binom{n}{x}p^x(1-p) p(x∣n,p)=(xn​)px(1−p) Approximation Poisson Distribution When nnn is large and npnpnp is of moderate size (perferably np≤7np\le 7np≤7), binomial distribution can be approximated by Poisson(np)\text{Poisson}(np)Poisson(np) Hypergeometric Distribution If N10,000N\gt 10,000N10,000 and n/N1%n/N\lt 1\%n/N1%, hypergeometric distribution can be approximated by binomial distribution. Normal Distribution De Moivre-Laplace theorem Suppose Binomial(n,p)\text{Binomial}(n,p)Binomial(n,p), when np(1−p)5np(1-p)\gt 5np(1−p)5, normal distribution N(np,np(1−p))\mathcal{N}(np, np(1-p))N(np,np(1−p)) provides a good approximation of Binomial(n,p)\text{Binomial}(n,p)Binomial(n,p).

title: Exponential Distribution
content: The pdf for T∼Exponential(λ)T\sim \text{Exponential}(\lambda)T∼Exponential(λ) is f(t∣λ)=λe−λt⋅It0f(t|\lambda)=\lambda e^{-\lambda t} \cdot \mathbb{I}_{t\gt 0} f(t∣λ)=λe−λt⋅It0​ Its cdf is F(t∣λ)=(1−e−λt)⋅It0F(t|\lambda)=(1-e^{-\lambda t})\cdot \mathbb{I}_{t\gt 0} F(t∣λ)=(1−e−λt)⋅It0​ which implies the survivor function is S(t):=P(Tt)=1−F(t∣λ)=e−λtS(t):=\mathbb{P}(T\gt t)=1-F(t|\lambda)=e^{-\lambda t} S(t):=P(Tt)=1−F(t∣λ)=e−λt Example 1 A very large logging operation has serious problems keeping their skidders operating properly. The equipment fails at the rate of 333 breakdowns every 484848 hours. Assume that xxx is time between breakdowns and is exponentially distributed. What is the probability of a single breakdown within 242424 hours? So the statement gives x∼Exponential(348)x\sim \text{Exponential}(\frac{3}{48})x∼Exponential(483​), whose cdf F(t∣λ)=1−e−λtF(t|\lambda)=1-e^{-\lambda t}F(t∣λ)=1−e−λt. The answer is then F(24)=1−exp⁡(−1.5)=0.7769F(24)=1-\exp(-1.5)=0.7769F(24)=1−exp(−1.5)=0.7769

content: If the binomial distribution can be treated as from random sampling with replacement from a population of size NNN, SSS of which are successes and S/N=pS/N = pS/N=p, then the hypergeometric distribution models the number of successes from random sampling without replacement. P(x∣n,N,S)=(Sx)(N−Sn−x)(Nn),x=max⁡(0,n−N+S),…,min⁡(n,S)\mathbb{P}(x|n,N,S)=\frac{\binom{S}{x}\binom{N-S}{n-x}}{\binom{N}{n}}, \\ x=\max(0,n-N+S), \dots, \min(n,S) P(x∣n,N,S)=(nN​)(xS​)(n−xN−S​)​,x=max(0,n−N+S),…,min(n,S) 记为 X∼Hypergeometric(n,N,S)X\sim \text{Hypergeometric}(n,N,S)X∼Hypergeometric(n,N,S)．令 p=SNp=\frac{S}{N}p=NS​，其期望和方差为 μX=np,σX2=np(1−p)N−nN−1\mu_X = np,\\ \sigma^2_X=np(1-p)\frac{N-n}{N-1} μX​=np,σX2​=np(1−p)N−1N−n​

title: Kurtosis
content: Kurtosis is often used to measure the heaviness of a distribution’s tail: KurtX=E[(X−μX)4]σX4=:μ4σ4\text{Kurt}_X=\frac{\mathbb{E}[(X-\mu_X)^4]}{\sigma_X^4}=:\frac{\mu_4}{\sigma^4} KurtX​=σX4​E[(X−μX​)4]​=:σ4μ4​​ If a distribution’s kurtosis is 3\gt 33, then it’s called heavy tailed, otherwise 3\lt 33 light tailed.

title: Memoryless Property
content: 如果 P(Xs+t∣Xs)=P(Xt)\mathbb{P}(X\gt s+t | X\gt s)=\mathbb{P}(X\gt t) P(Xs+t∣Xs)=P(Xt) 那么称分布是 memoryless 的，可以这样理解为已经等了多久不会影响未来等待时间

Z=X−μσZ=\frac{X-\mu}{\sigma}Z=σX−μ​, then Z∼N(0,1)Z\sim \mathcal{N}(0,1)Z∼N(0,1). title: Poisson Distribution
content: Introduction Assume that an interval is divided into a very large number of equal subintervals so that the probability of the occurrence of an event in any subinterval is very small (e.g., ≤0.05\le 0.05≤0.05). The Poisson distribution models the number of events occurring on that interval, assuming The probability of the occurrence of an event is constant for all subintervals. There can be no more than one occurrence in each subinterval. Occurrences are independent. 直观来说，Poisson Distribution 是二项式分布在 p→0,n→∞p\to 0, n\to \infinp→0,n→∞ 的情况．当 np→λnp\to \lambdanp→λ 时，二项式分布就会收敛到 Poisson Distribution P(x∣λ)=e−λλxx!,x=0,1,2,…\mathbb{P}(x|\lambda)=\frac{e^{-\lambda}\lambda^x}{x!}, x=0,1,2,\dots P(x∣λ)=x!e−λλx​,x=0,1,2,… 我们用 X∼Poisson(λ)X\sim \text{Poisson}(\lambda)X∼Poisson(λ) 来表示． Mean and Variance μX=E[X]=λ,σX2=Var(X)=λ\mu_X=\mathbb{E}[X]=\lambda, \sigma^2_X=\text{Var}(X)=\lambda μX​=E[X]=λ,σX2​=Var(X)=λ Proposition The sum of Poisson Distribution is still Poisson Distribution KPoisson(λ)=Poisson(Kλ)K\text{Poisson}(\lambda)=\text{Poisson}(K\lambda) KPoisson(λ)=Poisson(Kλ)

title: Unknown Variance, Check Mean
content: The goal is to check if a population’s mean is as claimed given that we have no knowledge on the population variance. Suppose the sample size is nnn. The main test statistic is t=xˉ−μ0s/nt=\frac{\bar{x}-\mu_0}{s/\sqrt{n}} t=s/n​xˉ−μ0​​ H0H_0H0​ H1H_1H1​ ppp-value Devision Rule, Reject H0H_0H0​ if … μ=μ0\mu=\mu_0μ=μ0​ or μ≤μ0\mu\le\mu_0μ≤μ0​ μμ0\mu\gt\mu_0μμ0​ P(Tt)\mathbb{P}(T\gt t)P(Tt) ttn−1,αt\gt t_{n-1,\alpha}ttn−1,α​ μ=μ0\mu=\mu_0μ=μ0​ or μ≥μ0\mu\ge\mu_0μ≥μ0​ μμ0\mu\lt\mu_0μμ0​ P(Tt)\mathbb{P}(T\lt t)P(Tt) t−tn−1,αt\lt -t_{n-1,\alpha}t−tn−1,α​ μ=μ0\mu=\mu_0μ=μ0​ μ≠μ0\mu e \mu_0μ=μ0​ P(∣T∣∣t∣)\mathbb{P}(\vert T\vert \gt \vert t \vert)P(∣T∣∣t∣) ∣t∣tn−1,α/2\vert t\vert t_{n-1,\alpha/2}∣t∣tn−1,α/2​ Here, tdf,αt_{df, \alpha}tdf,α​ can be retrieved from ttt-table. Notation dfdfdf means degree of freedom, which is usually n−1n-1n−1. ttt-distribution If ZZZ is a standardized normal r.v. Z∼N(0,1)Z\sim \mathcal{N}(0,1)Z∼N(0,1), and r.v. XXX has a χ2\chi^2χ2 distribution with vvv degrees of freedom, i.e., X∼χv2X\sim \chi_v^2X∼χv2​, independent of ZZZ, thenZX/v∼tv\frac{Z}{\sqrt{X/v}}\sim t_vX/v​Z​∼tv​i.e., follows a ttt-distribution with vvv degrees of freedom.
